fields.Name: MagnetMail
fields.Description: Higher Logic MagnetMail (formerly Real Magnet) email marketing platform. Legacy SOAP API covering recipients, groups, messages, tracking, upload jobs, saved searches, personalization fields, and the Personify subscription bridge. Auth is two-step (Auth...

fields.Name: Recipients
fields.Description: Contact records (email recipients). Primary read is searchForRecipients with pagination; detail read is getRecipientDetails by recipient_id. Supports add/edit; delete is soft via unsubscribeRecipients. APIPath holds the SOAP action used for list/read.

fields.Name: recipient_id
fields.Description: MagnetMail recipient identifier (integer).

fields.Name: email
fields.Description: Email address (de-facto natural key).

fields.Name: Custom_Id
fields.Description: Caller-supplied custom identifier for cross-system matching.

fields.Name: unsubscribed
fields.Description: Soft-delete flag. Set by unsubscribeRecipients.

fields.Name: text_only
fields.Description: True when recipient prefers text-only emails.

fields.Name: custom1
fields.Description: MagnetMail custom slot MM_1 (positional).

fields.Name: custom2
fields.Description: MagnetMail custom slot MM_2.

fields.Name: Groups
fields.Description: Distribution groups. Primary SOAP action is getGroupsUTC (preferred over getGroups for timezone safety). Supports create via addGroup and batch send via sendMessageToGroup (BETA).

fields.Name: group_id
fields.Description: MagnetMail group identifier.

fields.Name: category_id
fields.Description: Associated group category (see GroupCategories).

fields.Name: GroupCategories
fields.Description: Category hierarchy used to organize groups.

fields.Name: parent_category_id
fields.Description: Parent in the category tree (null for roots).

fields.Name: GroupRecipients
fields.Description: Recipients within a specific group. Read via getGroupRecipients; counted via getGroupRecipientsCount. Templated on group_id — the connector iterates the Groups list.

fields.Name: Messages
fields.Description: Email messages (templates / drafts / sends). Primary read is getMessagesUTC with date-range filters for incremental polling. Supports create/update via createMagnetMailMessage / editMagnetMailMessage.

fields.Name: MessageCategories
fields.Description: Category metadata for messages.

fields.Name: MessageSends
fields.Description: Sent-to records per message — who a message was delivered to. Templated on message_id via GetMessageSentTracking.

fields.Name: MessageOpens
fields.Description: Per-recipient open events. Templated on message_id.

fields.Name: MessageLinkClicks
fields.Description: Link-click activity per recipient. Templated on message_id.

fields.Name: MessageLinks
fields.Description: Tracked links (URLs) in a given message.

fields.Name: MessageTrackingOverall
fields.Description: Aggregate tracking metrics per message (opens, clicks, bounces, unsubscribes totals).

fields.Name: MessageTrackingDetailed
fields.Description: Per-recipient opens+clicks+bounces over a date range.

fields.Name: event_type
fields.Description: sent / open / click / bounce / unsub

fields.Name: Unsubscribes
fields.Description: Account-wide unsubscribe list. Per-message unsubscribes available via GetUnsubscribeTracking.

fields.Name: SpamComplaints
fields.Description: Recipients that flagged a message as spam.

fields.Name: SuppressedRecipients
fields.Description: Recipients on the suppression list (hard bounces, manual suppression).

fields.Name: UploadJobs
fields.Description: Async bulk CSV upload jobs. Submit via uploadListQueue (or UploadListInitialQueue BETA); poll status via getUploadJobStatusUTC.

fields.Name: SavedSearches
fields.Description: Pre-defined recipient search definitions. runSavedSearch executes one.

fields.Name: RecipientFields
fields.Description: Custom field definitions for the account (legacy MM_1..42 slots + enhanced fields).

fields.Name: fieldNameText
fields.Description: Friendly label of the custom field (e.g., `Membership Level`).

fields.Name: fieldNameValue
fields.Description: Underlying slot identifier (MM_1..42 or enhanced name).

fields.Name: Account
fields.Description: Authenticated user/account metadata. Single record via getUserDetails.

fields.Name: PersonifySubscriptionMappings
fields.Description: Personify AMS bridge — lookup Personify subscription <-> MagnetMail list mappings.

fields.Name: Errors
fields.Description: Human-readable details for numeric MagnetMail error codes. Called on-demand via getErrorDetails(error_nbr).

fields.Name: EventSignUps
fields.Description: Event registration entry point. Create-only via CreateEventSignUp.

fields.Name: Registrants
fields.Description: Array of registrants (serialized JSON).
